name: Good Kill!
short_description: Good Kill is an immersive FPS game where players take control of a door gunner in a military helicopter during wartime. Engage in intense combat across destructible environments, complete missions, and upgrade your helicopter and weapons to dominate the battlefield.
detailed_description:
Attention, Gunners!! We're continuing to work hard to take our game to the next level. With this update, we're bringing you a range of new features, fixes, and gameplay improvements. Here's what's coming:Immerse yourself in the heart of the war with "Good Kill," a gripping first-person shooter (FPS) experience that puts you in the hot seat as a door gunner in a military helicopter. As the conflict rages on, you'll embark on adrenaline-fueled missions across treacherous landscapes, engaging in intense firefights against enemy infantry, customizable helicopters and guns in fortified positions.

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Call in Air Support for Strategic Supremacy

In Good Kill, you're never alone on the battlefield. Strategically deploy your helicopter’s mounted weapons to provide devastating firepower from above, clearing paths and breaking enemy lines.Precision and timing are key—choose your targets wisely and ensure every shot counts. Control the skies, control the battle!

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Experience the Thrills in the Good Kill!

Experience the adrenaline rush of the war in 'Good Kill,' where you're thrust into the heart of the war as a door gunner. Engage in intense firefights, navigate dynamic environments, and upgrade your arsenal to dominate the battlefield. Immerse yourself in an unforgettable FPS experience.

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Challenges of combat

In "Good Kill," every decision counts as you navigate the challenges of combat. With different types of weapons at your disposal, including small arms and mounted guns, you'll rain down devastation on the enemy forces while maneuvering through dynamic environments filled with destructible objects and buildings. Adaptability is key as you upgrade your helicopter and weapons between missions, customizing your loadout to suit the ever-evolving demands of the battlefield.

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Bring the War Era to Life

Prepare to be fully immersed in the chaos of war with stunning graphics, authentic sound effects, and pulse-pounding music that capture the intensity of the era. Whether you're engaging in high-stakes rescue missions, defending key strategic locations, or providing fire support for ground troops, every moment in Good Kill is a test of skill, strategy, and courage.

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Choose Your Chopper Wisely!

In Good Kill, your helicopter is more than just a ride, it’s your lifeline. Will you command the versatile UH1-B for reliable firepower, or opt for the agile OH6 to outmaneuver your enemies? Upgrade weapons, reinforce armor, and customize your chopper to gain a tactical advantage and outsmart your enemies. Every choice matters, pick the right tool for the mission and rule the skies!

The game is under development. Visuals does not represent end-quality of the game.

Make your mark on history

With a captivating single-player campaign featuring multiple levels and a variety of missions, "Good Kill" offers an unforgettable FPS experience that will keep you on the edge of your seat from start to finish. Are you ready to take to the skies, dodge enemy fire, and become the ultimate door gunner? Join the fight in "Good Kill" and make your mark on history.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish*, Greek
*languages with full audio support
